Salo,

Open application – A precise professional with strong route management skills

Dear recruiter,

I am sending you this open application because I am looking for new challenges in distribution and logistics, and I believe my experience would fit your needs very well. I am used to independent, responsible, and precision-focused work.

I currently work as an early-morning delivery worker, which has taught me resilience under pressure and seamless routine management. One of my strengths is exceptionally strong visual and numerical memory; I learn and remember new routes, customer details, and delivery box locations very quickly without constant repetition. I can optimize driving routes independently and make sure deliveries arrive precisely on schedule, even in demanding weather conditions and during night shifts.

Why choose me?

  • Independence and reliability: I handle assigned tasks from start to finish without constant supervision.
  • Fast learner: By understanding larger systems quickly, I can master new areas and routes in no time.
  • Attitude: I am not afraid of physical work or unconventional working hours.

I am ready to take on new challenges and bring a strong work ethic with me. I would gladly come to an interview to tell you more about how I could benefit your organization.

Kind regards,

Markus Sorola
